tx.name: Texas
tx.notes: Texas Hotel Occupancy Tax. Cities and counties may add up to 8.5% local HOT.

ca.name: California
ca.notes: No state-level lodging tax. Cities and counties levy a Transient Occupancy Tax (TOT) ranging roughly 6–16.5%.

fl.name: Florida
fl.notes: Florida charges 6% state sales tax plus county-level discretionary surtax and tourist development tax.

ny.name: New York
ny.notes: 4% state sales tax plus local sales tax and (in NYC) hotel room occupancy tax. NYC has strict short-term rental rules.

co.name: Colorado
co.notes: 2.9% state sales tax plus local lodging taxes. Many resort towns add a Local Marketing District tax.

al.name: Alabama
al.notes: 4% state lodging tax plus local lodging taxes.

ak.name: Alaska
ak.notes: No state-level lodging tax. Boroughs and cities levy bed taxes.

az.name: Arizona
az.notes: 5.5% state TPT plus county and city transient lodging tax.

ar.name: Arkansas
ar.notes: 6.5% state sales tax plus 2% short-term rental tax and local lodging taxes.

de.name: Delaware
de.notes: 8% state lodging tax plus optional local lodging tax.

ga.name: Georgia
ga.notes: 4% state sales tax plus $5/night state hotel-motel fee and local hotel-motel tax.

hi.name: Hawaii
hi.notes: 10.25% Transient Accommodations Tax plus 4.712% GET and 3% county TAT.

id.name: Idaho
id.notes: 6% state sales tax plus 2% travel and convention tax and local resort taxes.

il.name: Illinois
il.notes: 6% state Hotel Operators' Occupation Tax plus local hotel taxes.

in.name: Indiana
in.notes: 7% state sales tax plus county innkeeper's tax.

ia.name: Iowa
ia.notes: 5% state hotel/motel tax plus local hotel/motel tax up to 7%.

ks.name: Kansas
ks.notes: 6.5% state sales tax plus local transient guest tax.

ky.name: Kentucky
ky.notes: 6% state sales tax plus 1% transient room tax and local transient room tax.

la.name: Louisiana
la.notes: 4.45% state sales tax plus parish and local hotel taxes.

me.name: Maine
me.notes: 9% state lodging tax. No general local add-on.

md.name: Maryland
md.notes: 6% state sales tax plus county hotel rental tax.

ma.name: Massachusetts
ma.notes: 5.7% state room occupancy excise plus local option, community impact, and Cape & Islands fees.

mi.name: Michigan
mi.notes: 6% state use tax plus county accommodations tax.

mn.name: Minnesota
mn.notes: 6.875% state sales tax plus city and special-district lodging taxes.

ms.name: Mississippi
ms.notes: 7% state sales tax plus local tourism and economic development taxes.

mo.name: Missouri
mo.notes: 4.225% state sales tax plus local tourism tax.

mt.name: Montana
mt.notes: 4% lodging facility use tax plus 4% lodging facility sales tax. Resort taxes in some towns.

ne.name: Nebraska
ne.notes: 5.5% state sales tax plus 1% state lodging tax and local lodging tax.

nv.name: Nevada
nv.notes: No state-level transient lodging tax. Counties levy combined transient lodging tax up to 13.5%.

nh.name: New Hampshire
nh.notes: 8.5% Meals and Rooms Tax. No local add-on.

nj.name: New Jersey
nj.notes: 6.625% state sales tax plus 5% state occupancy fee and local occupancy taxes.

nm.name: New Mexico
nm.notes: 4.875% state gross receipts tax plus local lodgers' tax up to 5%.

nc.name: North Carolina
nc.notes: 4.75% state sales tax plus county occupancy tax.

nd.name: North Dakota
nd.notes: 5% state sales tax plus local lodging and restaurant tax.

oh.name: Ohio
oh.notes: 5.75% state sales tax plus county and municipal lodging excise.

ok.name: Oklahoma
ok.notes: 4.5% state sales tax plus city lodging and tourism tax.

or.name: Oregon
or.notes: 1.5% state lodging tax plus local lodging taxes.

pa.name: Pennsylvania
pa.notes: 6% state sales tax plus 1% hotel occupancy tax in Allegheny/Philadelphia and county hotel taxes.

ri.name: Rhode Island
ri.notes: 7% state sales tax plus 6% state hotel tax (5% statewide + 1% local-share).

sc.name: South Carolina
sc.notes: 5% sales tax + 2% accommodations tax plus local accommodations tax.

sd.name: South Dakota
sd.notes: 4.5% state sales tax plus 1.5% tourism tax (seasonal) and municipal taxes.

tn.name: Tennessee
tn.notes: 7% state sales tax plus county and city occupancy taxes.

ut.name: Utah
ut.notes: 4.85% state sales tax plus 0.32% statewide and local transient room tax.

vt.name: Vermont
vt.notes: 9% state meals and rooms tax. Some municipalities add 1%.

va.name: Virginia
va.notes: 5.3% state sales tax plus county and city transient occupancy tax.

wa.name: Washington
wa.notes: 6.5% state sales tax plus local sales tax and special hotel/motel tax.

wv.name: West Virginia
wv.notes: 6% state sales tax plus local hotel occupancy tax.

wi.name: Wisconsin
wi.notes: 5% state sales tax plus county and municipal room tax.

wy.name: Wyoming
wy.notes: 4% state sales tax plus 5% statewide lodging tax and local lodging taxes.
